evidence_scope: Production chunked-Gumbel optimization-regression A/B. PASS means prechunking leaves each controlled output exact; it does not mean the known #48291 quality defects are acceptable.
anomaly_accounting: greeting starts in Chinese (你好！我), then degenerates into whitespace, digits, a replacement glyph, and punctuation
explain_diffusion starts coherently, then repeats sentences/model tokens and mixes punctuation with the Chinese token 生成
moon_phases starts with one correct sentence, then emits moon symbols, replacement glyphs, whitespace, punctuation, and an unfinished self-correction
no stored decoded output contains the literal word 'user'; that token appears only in the rendered chat-template prompts

prompts.classification: Chinese prefix followed by whitespace/digit/replacement-glyph degeneration; exact versus control

messages.content: Explain what a diffusion language model is in one sentence.

prompts.rendered_prompt:

<|channel>thought
<channel|>

Here is the correct sentence  sentence

 me

,,  the the sentence
